languages.original_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

languages.text: "Не надейся узреть душу Лилэтан. Ты умен для мон-кай, но твое сердце столь же черство, как у твоих сородичей".
"Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."
languages.original_text: "Не надейся узреть душу Лилэтан. Ты умен для мон-кай, но твое сердце столь же черство, как у твоих сородичей".

traits.locale_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."
"Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."
"Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

languages.text: «Abandona toda esperanza de ver el alma del Lilaethan. Eres inteligente para ser mon-keigh, pero tu corazón está tan marchitado como el de los demás».
languages.original_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

traits.locale_text: «Abandona toda esperanza de ver el alma del Lilaethan. Eres inteligente para ser mon-keigh, pero tu corazón está tan marchitado como el de los demás».

languages.text: 「リラエサンの魂を垣間見ようなどという望みは、捨てることだ。モンケイにしては賢いが、お前の心も、ほかの者と同じように干からびている」
languages.original_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

traits.locale_text: 「リラエサンの魂を垣間見ようなどという望みは、捨てることだ。モンケイにしては賢いが、お前の心も、ほかの者と同じように干からびている」

languages.text: “放下任何窥探莉莱赞灵魂的希望吧。身为猴子你算聪明，可你的心跟你同类一样枯萎。”
languages.original_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

traits.locale_text: “放下任何窥探莉莱赞灵魂的希望吧。身为猴子你算聪明，可你的心跟你同类一样枯萎。”

languages.text: "Lasst alle Hoffnung fahren, einen Blick auf die Seele des Lileath zu erhaschen. Ihr seid klug für einen Chem-Pan-Sey, aber Euer Herz ist ebenso ausgedörrt."
languages.original_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

traits.locale_text: "Lasst alle Hoffnung fahren, einen Blick auf die Seele des Lileath zu erhaschen. Ihr seid klug für einen Chem-Pan-Sey, aber Euer Herz ist ebenso ausgedörrt."

languages.text: « Abandonnez tout espoir de contempler l'âme de la lilaethan. Pour un mon-keigh, vous êtes plutôt intelligent, mais votre cœur est aussi flétri que celui de vos congénères. »
languages.original_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

traits.locale_text: « Abandonnez tout espoir de contempler l'âme de la lilaethan. Pour un mon-keigh, vous êtes plutôt intelligent, mais votre cœur est aussi flétri que celui de vos congénères. »

languages.text: "Lilaethan'ın ruhunu görme umudundan vazgeç. Bir mon-keigh için zekisin ama senin de kalbin diğerleri gibi buruşmuş."
languages.original_text: "Let go of any hope of glimpsing the soul of the Lilaethan. You are clever for a mon-keigh, but your heart is as shrivelled as any other's."

traits.locale_text: "Lilaethan'ın ruhunu görme umudundan vazgeç. Bir mon-keigh için zekisin ama senin de kalbin diğerleri gibi buruşmuş."
